meta.description: A house for art, ideas and community in Addis Ababa — exhibitions, screenings, performances, a library, a shop and a café, under one arch.

home.heroTitle: A house for art, ideas & community
home.heroBody: Where Addis Ababa's heritage meets contemporary expression — exhibitions, screenings, performances, books and coffee, under one arch.
